greet.text: Shin doesn't look up from the case he's polishing. "You. About time. Ratz says you slept a week face-down in noodles. I've been holding your deck like it's my job." He taps the glass. "It is not my job."

give.text: Shin grunts, reaches under the counter, and slaps a battered cyberspace deck onto the glass. "There. Your UXB. Don't bleed on it, don't pawn it back to me, and don't tell anyone Shin is soft."

thanks.text: "Thanks is worth nothing. Credits are worth something. Now go — you're scaring the paying customers."

wares.text: "Chips, chrome, the occasional clean ID. Cash only, and don't bleed on the counter." The cases are full of other people's bad luck, neatly priced.

bye.text: Shin is already looking past you, at the door. "Mind the step."
